science.title: Nature might have a universal rhythm
science.description: Researchers analyzed communication across the animal kingdom, including firefly flashes, cricket chirps, frog croaks, birds’ mating displays and more. Across species, many communication signals repeat at two beats per second.

ai.title: Humanoid robot chases wild boars in viral video
